历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the lowest science rankings were approximately 324, 633, 1354, and 552, with significant fluctuations; the 2024 baseline is about 552. In 2025, Qinghai's college entrance exam reform introduced Physics/History categories, changing the ranking system. Using the 2024 science ranking of 552 as a reference baseline; the science enrollment plans from 2021 to 2024 were 32, 30, 30, and 30, basically stable; the 2026 Physics category plan is only 3, a reduction of about 90% from the 2024 science plan of 30, representing a substantial contraction, significantly intensifying competition and pushing the ranking number smaller.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 14th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking (Top 20), with a continuous rise in recent years (from 19th in 2021 to 14th in 2026), enhancing the school's comprehensive strength and appeal; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving teacher ethics incidents (Gong Lin, Wu Junying, etc.), but the school's public relations response has been relatively efficient; Douyin popularity is 'moderately hot' (overall rank 47), with sustained exposure from the 'National Defense Seven Sons' label, overall application attention is moderately high; 12 disciplines rated A- or above, including Information and Communication Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Mechanical Engineering A, Materials Science and Engineering A, etc., with top-tier engineering strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering Experimental Classes (Future Precision Engineering Technology, Xu Teli Elite Class, etc.) are popular majors with high social appeal; the total number of candidates in Qinghai Province in 2026 is about 48,000, with an estimated 30,672 in the Physics category, roughly the same as the 30,457 in 2025; Beijing Institute of Technology is located in Beijing, with obvious regional advantages; the school's enrollment proportion in Qinghai is extremely small, with only 3 Physics category spots in 2026, further increasing competition due to scarcity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2024 science baseline ranking of 552, the significant reduction effect of the 2026 Physics category plan dropping from 30 to 3, the enhanced appeal from the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking, and the limited suppression effect from the somewhat negative reputation, the predicted 2026 Physics category lowest ranking is approximately 304, with a range of 254–354.

- Engineering Experimental Class (Xu Teli Elite Class)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: With only 3 Physics category spots in 2026, competition is extremely fierce. For rankings within the predicted range of 254–354, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main target and Tier 1 as a reach; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<254), prioritize reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors (Future Precision Engineering Technology, Xu Teli Elite Class); for rankings near the upper limit (>354), proceed with caution and recommend using Tier 3 as a safety option.

历年位次与招生计划.text: Beijing Institute of Technology only has data for liberal arts in Qinghai Province in 2024, with a minimum ranking of approximately 216; there were no liberal arts admissions records from 2021 to 2023, making it a newly added category with limited reference data; in 2024, the liberal arts plan was 4 students; in 2026, the history category plan is 18 students, an increase of 350% compared to the 4 liberal arts students in 2024, representing a significant expansion, easing competition and pushing the ranking number higher.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 14th (Top 20) on the Soft Science main list in 2026, the university is at a very high level, which also strongly attracts liberal arts candidates; the reputation evaluation in 2026 is somewhat negative, but mainly involves incidents of misconduct by science and engineering supervisors, with limited impact on liberal arts admissions; Douyin popularity is 'relatively hot', with overall attention at a medium to high level; Business Administration A-, Management Science and Engineering A, and other management disciplines are somewhat related to the history category's enrollment majors (Social Science Experimental Class), but the evaluation of liberal arts disciplines is relatively weaker compared to science and engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Social Science Experimental Class (Humanities and Social Sciences direction, Management and Economics direction) has stable social popularity; the estimated number of history category candidates in Qinghai Province in 2026 is about 17,328, basically unchanged from 17,212 in 2025; universities in Beijing are highly attractive to liberal arts candidates in Qinghai; the 18 history category plans in 2026 represent a significant increase compared to the 4 liberal arts plans in 2024, increasing application opportunities.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2024 liberal arts baseline ranking of 216, the significant expansion effect of the history category plan from 4 to 18 students in 2026, and the attractiveness of the university's level, the predicted minimum ranking for the history category in 2026 is approximately 640, with a range of 563 to 717.
